name: Crunch Top Sweet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sweet potatoes, whipped topping, icing sugar, and cream cheese in a mixing bowl. Beat with an electric mixer until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture into a coconut crust prepared by combining 3 1/2 ounces shredded coconut and 4 tablespoons melted butter (or margarine).
3. Sprinkle the remaining ingredients (1/4 cup chopped pecans, 1/4 cup flour, 1/4 cup brown sugar, 2 tablespoons melted butter or margarine, 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon, and 1/2 teaspoon nutmeg) evenly over the pie filling.
4. Bake at 325°F for about 10 minutes, or until the topping begins to brown. Chill thoroughly before serving.
Yield: 1 8-inch pie
